scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,panel,admin -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w panel" "npm run dev -w panel-super"
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w panel && npm run build -w panel-super
